items.summary: Investigate and fix the HTTP 403 error ('Erro na análise: 403') that occurs when users upload chart images from mobile devices. Review the API request format in frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to ensure mobile screenshots are properly encoded and sent with correct headers and authentication.

Add diagnostic logging to frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to capture request details (headers, payload size, content type) when API calls fail with 403 status, helping identify authentication or permission issues specific to mobile image uploads.

Verify that the Google Gemini Vision API key in frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts has the necessary permissions and quotas enabled for image analysis requests. Add validation to check if the API key is properly configured before sending requests.

Ensure mobile screenshot images are properly converted to the correct format and size before being sent to the Google Gemini Vision API. Add image preprocessing in frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to handle different mobile screenshot formats and dimensions that may trigger 403 errors.
